bvector(3) Library Functions Manual bvector(3)

NAME

bvector - Dynamic byte vector for PEM decoding.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


unsigned char * buf
size_t ptr
size_t len

Detailed Description

Dynamic byte vector for PEM decoding.

Type alias for VECTOR(unsigned char) - a dynamic array of bytes used during PEM parsing and trust anchor conversion.

Definition at line 187 of file pem.c.

Definition at line 187 of file pem.c.
